meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Solve Project Stagnation
content.seo_description: Stop leaving projects unfinished. Learn how to implement professional user onboarding using Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver faster and impress clients.
content.answer_block: Project stagnation often stems from poor user clarity. By implementing a frictionless onboarding flow, you guide users to their 'Aha!' moment immediately, increasing retention and project completion rates. Use Antigravity for rapid architectural scaffolding and Claude Code to iterate on your onboarding logic with high-speed, expert-level code generation.
content.intro:
The blinking cursor of an unfinished project is the freelancer's greatest enemy. You start with high-octane motivation, only to watch the momentum evaporate as the scope creeps and the user experience blurs into a mess of unguided features. It’s not a lack of talent; it’s a lack of a structural finish line.

The secret to shipping isn't working harder; it's guiding your user so effectively that the product sells itself. By focusing on a high-impact onboarding flow, you force yourself to define the core value prop, turning a never-ending build into a polished, deliverable asset that clients love.

steps.title: Architecting the Onboarding Flow
steps.description: Define the minimal path from sign-up to the first core feature usage. We use Antigravity to generate the state machine for this flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a state machine schema for a SaaS user onboarding flow with 3 steps: welcome, feature highlight, and dashboard setup.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate onboarding state machine logic in typescript based on the Antigravity schema'

steps.title: Scaffolding the UI Components
steps.description: Generate high-fidelity onboarding modals that don't block the user but provide context.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate React components for a non-intrusive, 3-step onboarding walkthrough using Tailwind CSS.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'create OnboardingModal.tsx and OnboardingStep.tsx components using the generated schema'

steps.title: Implementing Progress Tracking
steps.description: Users need to see the finish line. We implement a progress bar that updates as the user completes setup steps.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a custom React hook 'useOnboardingProgress' to track completion percentage across 3 steps.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement useOnboardingProgress hook and integrate into the main onboarding component'

steps.title: Integrating Data Persistence
steps.description: Ensure the onboarding state survives a page refresh so the user doesn't get frustrated.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer for persisting onboarding status to localStorage with a fallback to a database API.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'create onboardingService.ts to handle local and remote state persistence'

steps.title: Finalizing and Polishing
steps.description: Add subtle animations and transitions to make the onboarding feel native and professional.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refine the onboarding component with Framer Motion transitions for smooth step navigation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'add framer-motion animations to all onboarding transitions for a premium feel'

pro_tips: Never force a sign-up before showing value; use 'Value-First' onboarding to let users play before they pay.
Keep your onboarding logic decoupled from your main UI state to prevent massive refactoring later.
Use Claude Code to write automated E2E tests specifically for your onboarding flow to ensure it never breaks in production.
Add a 'Skip' button. If a user is experienced, forcing them through onboarding creates instant friction.
Monitor your onboarding drop-off rate; if users exit at Step 2, that's where your UI is failing to communicate value.
content.next_steps: Once the onboarding flow is live, integrate a tracking tool like PostHog to see exactly where users drop off, then use Claude Code to run A/B tests on your copy.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting incomplete projects drain your potential. By mastering the onboarding flow, you provide immediate value to your clients and build a reputation for reliability and speed. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
